title: update-documentation-and-slides
summary: Rewrote README.md, PODMAN_MIGRATION.md, and presenterm/vso.md to describe the final two-cluster Podman-backed VSO architecture (kind-vault-lab/kind-vso-lab, auth/kubernetes-vso, host.containers.internal, all `make` targets including `verify-two-cluster`), added a superseded-topology note to docs/vso-demo-design.md, and marked task 12 done; validated everything against a live `make verify-two-cluster` run.
keyLearnings: - README's single-cluster Agent Injector/OTel demo (`make demo`/`make verify`/`make status`) is intentionally untouched/still single-cluster — only the VSO-related sections needed the two-cluster rewrite; kept clear labeling ("single-cluster Agent Injector/OTel demo") everywhere to avoid confusing the two demo paths.

- Verified every `make <target>` referenced in the three docs against `make help`/Makefile — no stale/invented target names remain (a grep-based check caught one false positive, "make sure", which was just prose).

- `docs/vso-demo-design.md` was the original single-cluster VSO design doc; rather than rewriting its whole narrative (goals/CRD choice/rotation story are still valid), added a "Superseded note" at the top pointing to `docs/vso-two-cluster-podman-plan.md` / `vso-two-cluster-audit.md` (which were already accurate and needed no changes) and the README.

- presenterm/vso.md slides now explicitly show `kind-vault-lab` vs `kind-vso-lab` boxes, the `auth/kubernetes-vso` → VSO_API_ADDR TokenReview path, and every `+exec` kubectl command now uses `--context kind-vault-lab`/`--context kind-vso-lab` explicitly instead of relying on current-context.

- Live-validated the full doc rewrite by running `bash scripts/verify-two-cluster.sh --check-only` and then a full `make verify-two-cluster` against the real running two-cluster environment — all 7 sections passed (placement, network via host.containers.internal, real auth/kubernetes-vso login, secret sync, and rotation/reset), confirming the documentation matches actual working commands.
blockers: none — feature vso-two-cluster-podman is now fully complete (all 12 tasks done); `make verify-two-cluster` is green.
